# DentNow backend runtime requirements.
#
# The qf framework wheel itself is installed separately from dist/ (import package
# is `framework`, distribution is `qf==1.0.5`):
#     pip install dist/qf-1.0.5-py3-none-any.whl
#
# NOTE: version floors are used here for a working install. Task 23 (CI) replaces
# this with a fully pinned + hashed lock generated by pip-tools and installed with
# `--require-hashes`, together with verification of the vendored wheel checksum.

# ── API / framework ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
flask>=3.0.0
flask-restx>=1.3.0

# ── Async serving: gunicorn + gevent workers; psycogreen for cooperative psycopg2
gunicorn>=21.2.0
gevent>=24.2.1
psycogreen>=1.0.2

# ── qf framework transitive deps (logger + ETL import chain runs eagerly even
#    when enable_etl=False; this does NOT add Redis or Kafka services) ────────
colorama>=0.4.6
redis>=5.0.0
kafka-python>=2.0.2,<3

# ── Database ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
sqlalchemy>=2.0.0
psycopg2-binary>=2.9.0
alembic>=1.13.0

# ── Validation ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
pydantic>=2.6.0

# ── Auth / Keycloak (JWT verification, JWKS) ────────────────────────────────
python-jose[cryptography]>=3.3.0
requests>=2.31.0

# ── Media (MinIO/S3 + image processing) ─────────────────────────────────────
boto3>=1.34.0

# Pillow 11 is the modern maintained line with AVIF via a plugin; pin >=10.3 for
# the security fixes required for untrusted-image decoding.
Pillow>=10.3.0

# ── Safe rich text ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
bleach>=6.1.0
markdown-it-py>=3.0.0

# ── Observability ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
prometheus-client>=0.20.0

# ── Config / utils ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
python-dotenv>=1.0.0
